title: Plettenberg Bay Arts Festival promises to paint the town
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Plett Arts...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Plett Arts Festival is going to be an epic event this year!","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Plett Arts Festival is going to be an epic event this year!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Chilled vibes and good vibrations matched with eclectic, colourful, playful, intimate, soul-filled, fun, creative and full-on artistic moments will surround the fest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Starting with the Plett beaches and estuaries from 3 to 7 October - from Lookout to Poortjies, Central Beach and the Piesang Valley Estuary - the fest switches to Cairnbrogie Farm on the airport road from 8 to 12 October.","html":"Starting with the Plett beaches and estuaries from 3 to 7 October - from Lookout to Poortjies, Central Beach and the Piesang Valley Estuary - the fest switches to Cairnbrogie Farm on the airport road from 8 to 12 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Barringtons, with its beautiful kitchen garden, restaurant and small hotel, will host the 2025 Land Art Hub, platforming talks and conversations with artists and thought leaders.","html":"Barringtons, with its beautiful kitchen garden, restaurant and small hotel, will host the 2025 Land Art Hub, platforming talks and conversations with artists and thought leaders."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Laid backThis year the fest will be packed with the coolest people, the most laid-back atmosphere and zero judgement should you whip out your phone for a selfie at an amazing land art installation, or put your feet up between galleries for an Aperol at a local restaurant.","html":"Laid back
This year the fest will be packed with the coolest people, the most laid-back atmosphere and zero judgement should you whip out your phone for a selfie at an amazing land art installation, or put your feet up between galleries for an Aperol at a local restaurant."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Discussing perhaps whether art speaks when words can't or that art isn't just what you see, it's what you feel, anything goes as it's about self-expression and no rules - a blank canvas, and that's exciting."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From art connected to nature to portraits in pastel and oils, bronzes, land art and energetic outdoor concerts, the fest officially starts on 3 October with the Twilight Meander through Plett's main street.","html":"From art connected to nature to portraits in pastel and oils, bronzes, land art and energetic outdoor concerts, the fest officially starts on 3 October with the Twilight Meander through Plett's main street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Exceeds expectationsThe remaining 10 days are packed with music, fine art, jazz, film, the Plett Land Art Route, collaborative installations, workshops and talks, cultural performances and exhibitions - all happening in Plett forests, beaches, galleries, restaurants and theatre spaces.","html":"Exceeds expectations
The remaining 10 days are packed with music, fine art, jazz, film, the Plett Land Art Route, collaborative installations, workshops and talks, cultural performances and exhibitions - all happening in Plett forests, beaches, galleries, restaurants and theatre spaces."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"In our fifth year now, this event has been supported over time by both local and international participants,\" said event director Daron Chatz.","html":"\"In our fifth year now, this event has been supported over time by both local and international participants,\" said event director Daron Chatz."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Each year, it moves my heart and exceeds my expectations in every way. The future of this event is so inspiring, and I am so grateful to every person who puts their time, energy and love into it to make it so magical.\"","html":"\"Each year, it moves my heart and exceeds my expectations in every way. The future of this event is so inspiring, and I am so grateful to every person who puts their time, energy and love into it to make it so magical.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Musicians Rynier Prince, Auriol Hayes and Wynand Davel with Plett Land Art Route Director Daron Chatz.Photo: Supplied","html":"Musicians Rynier Prince, Auriol Hayes and Wynand Davel with Plett Land Art Route Director Daron Chatz.Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Art exhibitions galore at the Plett Arts Festival.Photo: Supplied","html":"Art exhibitions galore at the Plett Arts Festival.Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Griqua Riel Dancers.Photo: Supplied","html":"Griqua Riel Dancers.Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
